sections.body: N0482는 ethical responsibilities를 여섯 Code principles로 요약했고, N0483은 Standards map을 연결했어. 이 LOS에서는 그 내용을 실제 행동 책임으로 번역했어.

sections.title: 7. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Employer instruction을 따랐으니 책임이 없다고 생각
Recommended procedures를 따르지 않았다는 이유만으로 자동 violation 판정
Client가 동의하면 illegal conduct도 허용된다고 생각

sections.title: 8. Exam workflow
bullets: ⑤ Required conduct와 실제 conduct 비교
⑥ Violation 여부와 corrective action을 분리

formulas: Decision rule: Actor → Duty → Facts/Timing → Applicable requirement → Required conduct → Violation? → Action
Conflict rule of thumb: disclose prominently; obtain consent when the Standard or arrangement requires it

quiz.question: 투자성과가 매우 좋았지만 추천 전 reasonable basis가 없었다. 가장 적절한 해석은?
choices: 결과와 별개로 process violation 가능성이 있다

quiz.question: Applicable local law보다 Code/Standards가 더 엄격하다면 일반적 원칙은?
quiz.explanation: Knowledge of Law의 기본 사고는 applicable requirements 중 stricter standard야.

quiz.question: Disclosure와 consent의 차이로 맞는 것은?
choices: Disclosure는 알리는 것, consent는 필요한 경우 승인을 받는 것
quiz.explanation: 상황에 따라 disclosure만으로 충분하지 않을 수 있어.

readings.title: Guidance for Standards I–VII
readings.sourceNote: 2026 Schweser R41 backbone + Marie note ledger N0484~N0499 integrated and independently rewritten for study use.
readings.overview: Standards I–VII를 specific situations에 적용하고, violations를 예방하기 위한 policies, controls, supervision, disclosure, consent, monitoring procedures를 설계한다.
readings.examPriority: 최상. Level II vignette에서 multi-standard conflicts, MNPI/mosaic, true client, suitability, reasonable basis, conflicts, supervisor responsibility가 반복된다.

losItems.label: LOS 41.a
losItems.title: Apply the Code and Standards to specific situations
losItems.losText: Demonstrate a thorough knowledge of the CFA Institute Code of Ethics and Standards of Professional Conduct by applying the Code and Standards to specific situations.
losItems.why: Level II Ethics의 본체야. 한 vignette 안에서 여러 Standards가 겹치므로 keyword matching이 아니라 duty·timing·exceptions를 구조적으로 적용해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: Standards I–VII를 실제 case facts에 적용해 누가 무엇을 위반했는지, 또는 위반하지 않았는지 판단하라는 뜻이야. 한 행동이 여러 Standards를 동시에 건드릴 수 있어.

sections.title: 2. Master case-solving rule
sections.body: Ethics는 ‘키워드가 보이면 그 Standard’가 아니야. Who knew what, when? Who owed duty to whom? Was the information material and public? Was consent written? Was there a trade or recommendation? 이 순서로 사실관계를 잠가야 해.

sections.title: 3. Standard I — Professionalism
table: Applicable rules 이해·준수, 더 엄격한 요구 적용, violation에서 dissociate
Gifts·travel·issuer pressure가 judgment를 왜곡하지 않게 통제
Client gift와 issuer gift의 위험 차이 무시
Fraud, dishonesty, deceit 또는 professional integrity에 악영향
복잡한 상품을 이해하지 못한 채 추천

sections.title: 4. Standard II — Integrity of Capital Markets
table: Material + nonpublic이면 trade/cause others to trade 금지
허용 가능, conclusion 자체가 material해도 가능

sections.title: 5. Standard III — Duties to Clients
table: Pension sponsor보다 beneficiaries가 client일 수 있음
공정하게 다루되 반드시 동시에/동일하게 할 필요는 없음
Different service levels는 disclosure와 fairness가 중요
법적 요구, illegal activity, client permission 등 exception

sections.title: 6. Standard IV — Duties to Employers
table: 떠날 준비는 가능하지만 client solicitation·records misuse 금지
Conflict 가능 compensation은 relevant parties의 written consent
Reasonable efforts to prevent/detect violations, adequate compliance system

sections.title: 7. Standard V — Investment Analysis, Recommendations, and Actions
table: Process, material risks/limitations, changes를 설명; fact vs opinion 구분
회사 records를 퇴사 시 개인소유로 착각

sections.title: 8. Standard VI — Conflicts of Interest
table: Boilerplate 한 줄이면 항상 충분하다고 생각
Client transactions before personal beneficial trades; employer policy 고려
Personal trade가 항상 영구 금지라고 생각

sections.title: 9. Standard VII — CFA responsibilities
table: VII(A) Conduct as Participants in CFA Institute Programs
VII(B) Reference to CFA Institute, designation, candidacy
정확하게 표현, superior performance implication 금지

sections.title: 10. High-yield cross-standard conflicts
bullets: MNPI + client order: client interest가 있어도 II(A) 위반을 정당화하지 못함
Gift + recommendation: I(B) objectivity와 VI(A) conflict disclosure가 동시에 걸릴 수 있음
Unsuitable product + weak research: III(C)와 V(A)가 동시에 걸릴 수 있음
Employer pressure + misleading report: I(B), I(C), V(B) 동시 검토
Personal trade before client block: VI(B), 경우에 따라 III(A)도 검토

sections.title: 11. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0484~N0499 전체를 직접 연결했어. 특히 N0485의 MNPI/mosaic flow, N0492의 true client/beneficiary flow, N0495의 supervisor duties, N0498의 conflict/priority/referral map을 case-solving structure에 흡수했어.

sections.title: 12. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Recommended procedure를 안 지켰다는 이유만으로 자동 violation
Fair dealing = simultaneous identical treatment라고 단정
Client consent가 있으면 illegal/MNPI conduct도 허용된다고 생각
Disclosure가 필요한 상황과 written consent가 필요한 상황을 섞음
Mosaic theory에서 nonmaterial nonpublic information조차 금지한다고 생각
Supervisor가 직접 violation하지 않았으니 책임이 없다고 생각

sections.title: 13. 60초 vignette worksheet
bullets: ② Duty recipient: client? beneficiary? employer? market? CFA Program?
③ Timeline: before/after recommendation, before/after public release, before/after resignation
⑦ Map exact Standard and test exception
⑧ Separate violation from best practice

formulas: MNPI test: Material? AND Nonpublic? → Do not trade or cause others to trade
Suitability test: Client facts + constraints + IPS + total portfolio context
Case engine: Actor → Duty → Timing → Facts → Exact Standard → Exception → Violation?

quiz.question: Analyst가 public filings와 nonmaterial nonpublic supplier comments를 결합해 material conclusion을 만들었다. 가장 적절한 것은?
quiz.explanation: Public + nonmaterial nonpublic pieces를 분석해 conclusion을 만드는 것은 mosaic theory로 허용될 수 있어.

quiz.question: Pension plan case에서 actual duty 대상이 beneficiaries라면 sponsor가 요구한 high-risk allocation은?
quiz.explanation: III(A)에서 true client/beneficiary를 먼저 식별해야 해.

quiz.question: Outside bonus가 employer duty와 conflict할 수 있다. 가장 적절한 사전 조치는?
quiz.explanation: Additional Compensation Arrangements는 written consent가 핵심이야.

quiz.question: Supervisor가 명백한 반복 violation signal을 무시했다. 본인이 직접 거래하지 않았다면?
quiz.explanation: Reasonable efforts to prevent/detect와 action duty가 있어.

quiz.question: Model forecast를 client에게 확정 사실처럼 표현했다. 가장 관련성이 높은 조합은?
choices: V(B) Communication 및 상황에 따라 I(C) Misrepresentation
quiz.explanation: Opinion/model output을 fact처럼 제시하면 communication·misrepresentation 문제가 생길 수 있어.

losItems.label: LOS 41.b
losItems.title: Preventive practices and procedures for avoiding Code and Standards violations
losItems.losText: Recommend practices and procedures designed to prevent violations of the Code of Ethics and Standards of Professional Conduct.
losItems.why: ‘위반 여부’만 판단하지 않고 조직이 어떤 control을 설계해야 하는지 묻는 LOS야. Policies, preclearance, restricted lists, firewalls, supervision, records를 Standard별로 연결해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: 특정 violation을 막기 위해 member, supervisor, firm이 어떤 practices와 procedures를 도입해야 하는지 추천하라는 뜻이야. Recommended procedure는 예방·탐지·증빙의 세 축으로 생각하면 좋아.

sections.title: 2. Intuition: Ethics control = Prevent + Detect + Escalate + Document
sections.body: 정책 한 줄만 있어서는 부족해. 실제로 위험을 줄이는 preclearance·access control·monitoring과, 문제가 생겼을 때 escalation/dissociation, 그리고 records가 필요해.

sections.title: 3. Standard I preventive controls
table: Compliance manual, jurisdiction matrix, legal/compliance consultation
Gift limits, preapproval, issuer-paid travel rules, independent research review
Source attribution, marketing review, performance verification
Training, product approval, specialist review, competency assessment

sections.title: 4. Standard II market-integrity controls
table: Information barriers, restricted/watch lists, wall-crossing logs, trading restrictions
Surveillance for unusual volume/order patterns, communications review, escalation

sections.title: 5. Standard III client-duty controls
table: Account legal documents and beneficiary mapping
Written allocation policy, staged dissemination rules, audit trail
Periodic KYC/IPS update, pre-trade checks, portfolio-context review
Composite policy, benchmark governance, independent calculation review
Need-to-know access, encryption, approved disclosure process

sections.title: 6. Standard IV employer/supervisor controls
bullets: Exit/resignation procedures, client-list and record ownership rules
Adequate compliance resources and periodic testing
When system is inadequate, decline supervisory role or escalate until controls are adequate

sections.title: 7. Standard V research-process controls
bullets: Fact/opinion labels and material-risk disclosure template
Record retention schedule with reproducible workpapers

sections.title: 8. Standard VI conflict controls
table: Annual/transaction-specific conflict disclosures, plain-language prominent notices
Preclearance, restricted list, blackout periods, duplicate confirms
Written registry and client disclosure before service relationship decisions

sections.title: 9. Standard VII controls
bullets: Exam-security training and prohibition on sharing confidential exam content
Approved wording for CFA designation/candidacy references
Marketing review to prevent claims of guaranteed or superior performance from CFA status

sections.title: 10. Supervisor playbook
bullets: Escalate to compliance/legal and dissociate when necessary

sections.title: 11. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0485의 MNPI decision flow는 restricted list·information barrier로, N0492의 beneficiary flow는 client-identification control로, N0495의 supervisor note는 prevent/detect/remediate framework로, N0498의 conflict map은 preclearance·disclosure registry로 실제 procedure화했어.

sections.title: 12. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Policy가 존재한다는 이유만으로 IV(C) duty 충족
Preclearance만 있으면 personal trade conflict가 완전히 사라짐
모든 문제의 답을 ‘disclose’로 고정—때로는 written consent, trading halt, dissociation이 필요

formulas: Control framework: Prevent → Detect → Escalate/Stop → Remediate → Document
Personal trading control stack: Preclearance + Restricted list + Blackout + Monitoring + Records

quiz.question: MNPI risk를 줄이기 위한 가장 직접적인 control 조합은?
choices: Information barriers + restricted/watch lists + trading controls

quiz.question: Supervisor duty 예방절차로 가장 불충분한 것은?
choices: Exception report를 검토하고 red flags를 조사한다
quiz.explanation: Reasonable supervision은 paper policy만으로 끝나지 않아.

quiz.question: Personal trading conflict control로 가장 적절한 것은?
Unsuitability 예방을 위한 핵심 procedure는?
choices: Periodic client/IPS update와 pre-trade portfolio-context check
quiz.explanation: Client circumstances가 변하므로 정기 업데이트와 적합성 검토가 필요해.

readings.title: Application of the Code and Standards: Level II
readings.sourceNote: 2026 Schweser R42 backbone + Marie note ledger N0500~N0509 integrated and independently rewritten for study use.
readings.overview: 긴 case facts를 actor, duty, timing, information status, exact Standard elements로 분해해 practices/policies/conduct를 평가하고 violation/no-violation reasoning을 설명한다.
readings.examPriority: 최상. 새로운 규칙보다 case integration과 distractor elimination, violation vs poor practice, corrective action 구분이 핵심이다.

losItems.label: LOS 42.a
losItems.title: Evaluate practices, policies, and conduct relative to the Code and Standards
losItems.losText: Evaluate practices, policies, and conduct relative to the CFA Institute Code of Ethics and Standards of Professional Conduct.
losItems.why: R42는 새로운 rule 암기가 아니라 긴 vignette 속 policies와 conduct를 평가하는 단계야. Violation 여부뿐 아니라 firm policy가 충분한지까지 본다.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: 주어진 행동, 정책, 절차를 Code and Standards와 비교해 적절한지, 부족한지, 위험한지 평가하라는 뜻이야. ‘누가 나빴다’가 아니라 facts를 Standard 요소에 맞춰야 해.

sections.title: 2. Intuition: Evaluate는 verdict보다 구조화된 비교
sections.body: 먼저 rule의 required elements를 적고 case facts가 각각 충족하는지 비교해. 예를 들어 MNPI라면 material과 nonpublic 두 조건, Additional Compensation이라면 conflict 가능성과 written consent, Suitability라면 client facts·IPS·portfolio context를 확인해.

sections.title: 5. Policy evaluation questions
bullets: Is the policy clear and specific enough?
Does actual conduct match the policy?

sections.title: 6. Violation vs poor practice vs recommended procedure
sections.body: 이 셋을 반드시 분리해. Standard가 요구한 mandatory conduct를 위반하면 violation. 권장절차를 따르지 않은 것은 risk를 높이지만 사실관계상 automatic violation이 아닐 수 있어. 반대로 좋은 내부 policy가 있어도 실제 conduct가 rule을 위반하면 violation 가능해.

sections.title: 7. Multi-standard portfolio/research case
sections.body: N0505의 portfolio/research note처럼 unsuitable recommendation, weak reasonable basis, incomplete communication, misleading performance, hidden conflict가 한 vignette에 동시에 나타날 수 있어. 가장 직접적인 violation을 찾고 추가 Standards를 점검해.

sections.title: 8. Alternative-investment case
sections.body: N0506은 illiquidity, valuation uncertainty, model limits, conflicts와 suitability를 함께 테스트했어. Alternative investment는 복잡하다는 이유로 duty가 낮아지는 게 아니라 오히려 due diligence와 risk communication 필요가 커져.

sections.title: 9. Derivatives case
sections.body: N0507은 derivatives의 leverage, nonlinear payoff, model assumptions, counterparty/liquidity risk를 제대로 이해·설명했는지 평가하는 구조야. Complex instrument라도 V(A), V(B), III(C)가 그대로 적용돼.

sections.title: 10. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0500~N0509 전체 case-analysis ledger를 반영했어. N0501의 who/when/material/public, N0502의 violation vs best practice, N0504의 distractor patterns, N0505~N0507의 portfolio/alternative/derivatives cases를 하나의 evaluation engine으로 통합했어.

sections.title: 11. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Case에 ‘gift’가 보이면 무조건 I(B) 위반—client gift와 issuer gift, disclosure/consent facts가 다름
‘모두에게 동시에’가 아니면 Fair Dealing violation—fair는 identical/simultaneous와 같지 않음
손실 발생 = unsuitable 또는 unreasonable basis 자동 판정
Complex product = sophisticated client에게 항상 suitable

sections.title: 12. Answer-choice elimination
bullets: Disclosure와 written consent를 바꿔치기한 선택지 제거
Materiality와 public status 중 하나만 확인한 MNPI 선택지 제거
Recommended procedure를 mandatory violation처럼 표현한 선택지 점검

formulas: Evaluation grid: Required element → Case fact → Satisfied? → Violation risk → Corrective action
Case timing rule: What was known, by whom, and before/after which action?

quiz.question: Firm에 personal-trading policy가 존재하지만 supervisor가 반복 exception alerts를 검토하지 않았다. 가장 적절한 평가는?
quiz.explanation: Reasonable supervision은 actual monitoring과 action을 포함해.

quiz.question: Recommended procedure를 따르지 않았다는 사실만으로?
choices: 자동 violation은 아니며 mandatory requirement 위반 여부를 따로 본다
quiz.explanation: Recommended practice와 Standard requirement를 분리해야 해.

quiz.question: Sophisticated client에게 illiquid alternative fund를 추천했다. 무엇을 가장 먼저 평가?
choices: Client mandate/constraints, total portfolio, reasonable basis와 risk communication
quiz.explanation: Sophistication만으로 suitability와 due diligence duty가 사라지지 않아.

quiz.question: MNPI case에서 첫 두 질문은?
quiz.explanation: II(A) trigger를 판단하는 핵심 두 축이야.

losItems.label: LOS 42.b
losItems.title: Explain why practices, policies, and conduct do or do not violate the Code and Standards
losItems.losText: Explain how the practices, policies, and conduct do or do not violate the CFA Institute Code of Ethics and Standards of Professional Conduct.
losItems.why: 정답 선택보다 한 단계 깊어. 정확한 Standard element와 fact를 연결해 왜 violation인지, 왜 아닌지, 어떤 corrective action이 필요한지 설명해야 해.

sections.title: 1. 한국어로 풀면
sections.body: 주어진 행동이 왜 특정 Standard를 위반하는지 또는 왜 위반하지 않는지 논리적으로 설명하라는 뜻이야. ‘나쁜 행동이라서’가 아니라 rule element와 case fact를 연결해야 해.

sections.title: 2. Explanation template
sections.body: ① State the relevant Standard. ② State the required/prohibited conduct. ③ Cite the decisive case fact. ④ Explain the match or exception. ⑤ State violation/no violation. ⑥ If asked, give corrective action.

sections.title: 3. 좋은 explanation vs 나쁜 explanation
table: ‘Information이 material and nonpublic이고 recommendation을 유발했으므로 II(A) 문제’
‘Recommendation이 IPS constraints와 맞지 않아 III(C) suitability issue’
‘Issuer-funded benefit이 objectivity를 compromise할 수 있고 safeguards/disclosure facts가 부족’
‘No monitoring/escalation despite supervisory duty, so reasonable efforts may be inadequate’

sections.title: 4. Why there is NO violation — 자주 놓치는 경우
bullets: Mosaic theory: public + nonmaterial nonpublic inputs로 conclusion 도출
Fair Dealing: clients를 fair하게 다루었지만 simultaneous identical dissemination은 아니었음
Preparation to compete: employer property/client solicitation 없이 퇴사 준비만 함
Recommended procedure 미준수: mandatory Standard facts가 충족되지 않음
Personal conduct: professional integrity/competence에 adverse reflection이 없는 unrelated private behavior

sections.title: 5. Why there IS violation — high-frequency patterns
bullets: Issuer pressure/gift가 independent judgment를 compromise하고 safeguard가 없음
Unsupported recommendation 또는 model limitations 미공개
Client order 전에 personal beneficial trade
Supervisor가 red flags를 알고도 reasonable action을 취하지 않음

sections.title: 6. Corrective action ladder
table: Do not trade/recommend, restrict security, seek public dissemination/compliance guidance
Prompt prominent disclosure; where required obtain written consent
Pause recommendation, obtain adequate support, document work
Review IPS/portfolio, communicate and correct within mandate
Escalate, refuse participation, dissociate if needed
Strengthen system, investigate, restrict activity, document remediation

sections.title: 7. Cross-standard explanation examples
bullets: Outside compensation may violate IV(B) for lack of written consent and also require VI(A) conflict disclosure
Misleading performance may implicate III(D) and I(C)
Weak model due diligence plus incomplete disclosure may implicate V(A) and V(B)
Personal trade ahead of client orders may implicate VI(B) and client loyalty concerns

sections.title: 8. 마리 노트 통합
sections.body: N0503·N0508의 case matrices를 explanation template로 바꾸고, N0504의 distractors—stricter law, disclosure vs consent, public/nonpublic, fair vs equal, client vs employer—를 ‘왜 아닌지’ 설명하는 section으로 흡수했어.

sections.title: 9. Common mistakes & CFA traps
bullets: Standard 이름만 쓰고 decisive fact를 연결하지 않음
Violation conclusion만 쓰고 required conduct를 설명하지 않음
Multiple Standards가 가능한데 하나만 과도하게 확정

sections.title: 10. 3문장 답안 템플릿
sections.body: ‘Relevant rule is ___. The decisive fact is ___, which [meets/does not meet] the rule because ___. Therefore the conduct [violates/does not violate] the Standard; the appropriate next action is ___.’ 이 구조면 vignette reasoning이 흔들리지 않아.

formulas: Explanation template: Rule → Required conduct → Decisive fact → Match/exception → Violation? → Action
No-violation test: identify the missing element or valid exception; do not rely on intent alone

quiz.question: 좋은 Ethics explanation의 핵심은?
quiz.explanation: 왜 위반인지/아닌지를 fact-rule connection으로 설명해야 해.

quiz.question: Public information과 nonmaterial nonpublic pieces를 결합했다면 no-violation 설명의 핵심은?
quiz.explanation: Nonmaterial nonpublic pieces는 mosaic theory에서 사용 가능할 수 있어.

quiz.question: Referral fee가 공개되지 않았다. 설명으로 가장 적절한 것은?
choices: Referral compensation/benefit disclosure duty를 충족하지 못했을 수 있다
quiz.explanation: VI(C)는 referral arrangement의 compensation/benefits disclosure를 요구해.

quiz.question: Case에서 violation이 없다고 판단할 때 가장 좋은 이유는?
choices: 필수 rule element가 충족되지 않았거나 유효한 exception이 있다
